3036920.name: Criminal Archives: Blade of Deceit DLC
3036920.description:
Explore deeper mysteries and unravel hidden secrets with the DLC for "Criminal Archives: Blade of Deceit"! Dive into four new enthralling locations, each packed with challenges and hidden objects.

Each location in this DLC not only offers more puzzles and hidden objects to find but also deepens the narrative, allowing you to engage with the game’s rich atmosphere and the intricate lives of its characters. Earn additional achievements and uncover layers of extra content and collectibles. Ready your detective skills—new secrets await! Explore deeper into the shadowy corners of the game with added challenges:

📜 THE JURY ROOM
Venture into the secretive confines of the jury room where pivotal legal decisions are made. This area is a goldmine for any detective, featuring puzzles that reveal the hidden machinations behind closed doors. Piece together clues from unseen records, essential for solving the overarching mystery!

📜 THE OLD WORKSHOP
Step into the dusty old workshop, a place filled with arcane substances and mysterious seeds. Investigate what experiments were being conducted by Leon and Michael!

📜 PRIVATE INVESTIGATOR'S ARCHIVE
Gain exclusive access to the private investigator's archive, where secrets not found in the police records lay buried. These files contain confidential information and insider knowledge that could provide the breakthrough you need in your case!

📜 CECILE'S WORKSHOP
Cecile's workshop is a treasure trove of alchemical mysteries and hidden information. Master the use of revealing fluid through engaging mini-games and uncover the secrets written in Cecile's diary. Each discovery could be the key to unlocking the deeper narrative woven through the game!

Achieve more, collect unique items, and earn additional achievements as you delve into these locations. Prepare yourself for an enriched detective journey that will test your skills and keep you guessing at every turn!
3036920.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
